title: Jet Freight Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Jet Freight Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Jet Freight Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jet Freight Logistics:
Jet Freight Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jet Freight Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
